mapper.sql:
and use_yn in ('Y','N')
and (room_nm like concat('%',#{srchWrd},'%') or place like concat('%',#{srchWrd},'%') or memo like concat('%',#{srchWrd},'%'))
mapper.select:
/* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.LectureDormiMapper.getLectureDormiList */ select a.* from t_lecture_dormi a where 1=1
and a.dormi_seq in ( select dormi_seq from t_lecture_dormi_stdnt where 1=1 and ( (start_dt between #{srchStartDt} and #{srchEndDt}) or (end_dt between #{srchStartDt} and #{srchEndDt}) ) )
